div.head: The President of the Technical Board (Stevens) to the Secretary of State
div.p: In connection with my cipher telegram August 10, 10 a.m., through TokyoSee telegram no. 272, Aug. 11, from the Chargé in Japan, supra. in regard to the loan, following conditions must obtain:

1st. Technical Board must have control over all receipts and expenditures. 2d. Proceeds of loan to be placed in the hands of Board which shall have sole charge of expenditure for the benefit of railway in its judgment. 3d. Other than members of Board, no person shall be retained in the service of railway in opposition to determinations of that nature [Board]. The last condition is to prevent the Chinese from loading payroll with high positions for their men as they are now doing.
